terminal_output.context_digest: Synthesized the webhook-inbox project into an agent-ready issue set.
terminal_output.project_update_markdown:
run_id: run_decomp_facade_commit

Decomposed the Event Trigger Webhook Inbox project into an agent-ready issue set.

## What I did with each part of your project
- Objective + scope became the inbox build and the durable queue.
- Operator-visible status became its own issue, blocked on the inbox build.

final_issues.title: Build the hosted webhook inbox (authenticate, dedupe, normalize)
final_issues.issue_body_markdown:
## Assignment

Build the hosted inbox.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Authenticates Linear + GitHub events.
- Dedupes redelivery.
- Normalizes to the internal wake envelope.
final_issues.assignment: Build the hosted inbox: authenticate, dedupe, normalize events to the wake envelope.
final_issues.output: A hosted inbox that emits normalized wake envelopes.

final_issues.title: Add the durable wake queue the Workflow Runner drains
final_issues.issue_body_markdown:
## Assignment

Add a durable queue.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Persists wake envelopes durably.
- Drains in order.
final_issues.assignment: Add a durable queue that persists wake envelopes for the Workflow Runner.

final_issues.title: Expose operator-visible status for every event
final_issues.issue_body_markdown:
## Assignment

Expose per-event status.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Every event shows accepted / deduped / refused / enqueued.
final_issues.assignment: Expose operator-visible per-event status across surfaces.
